calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-19-2011 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-19-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ellen Chaitin.; Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee ; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:
Plaintiff MERCY HOUSING, is present. Represented by RODRIGUEZ
Attorney, DANIEL BORNSTEIN, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, ANTHONY HARVEY, is present.
Attorney, DAVID TCHACK , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem NILS ROSENQUEST, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JAN-24-2010 is vacated.
